gate_cascade.rule: Emergency Brake beats every matrix route.
If authority is closed, no score or AI can open paper/live/wallet action.
System failures block action; data stale alone is not system failure.
No canonical interpretation without parser_version, schema_version, raw_hash, confidence, and provenance.
Weak single-source risk cannot become absolute veto without confidence.
Matrix is used only when not expired and not overridden by emergency brake.

fast_path_contract.rule: Fast Path may apply matrix but never blindly obeys matrix when brake/gates disagree.

slow_path_contract.rule: Slow Path learns and prepares; Fast Path applies; Authority Gate controls action.

raw_rules: RAW stores source payload/reference and raw_hash.
staging_gate_rules: STAGING records parse status, normalization status, confidence, and freshness.
Weak single-source data cannot become hard veto or canonical alone.
canonical_rules: Heavy provenance may live in sidecar/evidence/audit records.
Canonical row must reference raw_hash, parser_version, schema_version, confidence, and evidence reference.
No silent overwrite across parser/schema versions.
Reprocessing old RAW creates new versioned interpretation, not destructive replacement.

quarantine_lifecycle.rule: Quarantine must have lifecycle, retry/review policy, and cleanup/retention; otherwise it becomes a digital graveyard.

rules: Representation mismatch is REVIEW unless safety impact is proven.
Accepted false positive is ACCEPTED_REVIEW with evidence reference.
Validator must not silently downgrade FAIL to REVIEW.

ai_calibration_boundary.location: Sistem Kontrol Merkezi / AI Kalibrasyon ve Öğrenme
ai_calibration_boundary.rule: AI recommends; audit records; gate decides; authority controls action.

prune_criteria.rule: Eight centers may remain visually; decision engine remains four gates plus minimal route matrix.
